expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status values, UI badges, and filtering",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema and migration",
      "description": "As a user, tasks should store a status value (pending/in_progress/done) so task state persists.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'",
        "Migration applies without data loss",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["db/migrations/XXXX_add_task_status.sql", "src/models/task.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Backend: update task status action",
      "description": "As a user, I can change a task's status from the API so status updates persist.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add API endpoint or action to update status",
        "Status updates validate allowed values",
        "Tests for status update pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/services/taskService.ts", "src/routes/tasks.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show status badge on task card",
      "description": "As a user, I see a badge on each task card showing current status so I can scan tasks quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display status badge with Pending/In Progress/Done",
        "Badge style matches design system",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/TaskCard.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control to task rows",
      "description": "As a user, I can change status from the task list via a control (dropdown or quick action) so updates are quick.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Inline control updates status via API",
        "Optimistic UI or proper loading state",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/TaskRow.tsx", "src/ui/TaskList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter task list by status",
      "description": "As a user, I can filter task list by Pending/In Progress/Done so I focus on specific work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add filter control to task list UI",
        "Filter persists in query params or UI state",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/TaskList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
